name: E Fund 3-year Closed Operation Strategy Placement Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF)
summary: E Fund 3-year Closed Operation Strategy Placement Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF) is a mixed fund with a 3-year closed period, utilizing a flexible asset allocation strategy. The fund invests in a combination of stocks and bonds, aiming for capital appreciation and income. It is managed by E Fund Management Co., Ltd. and listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
